translations.en: a very large woman with a deliberate smile.
translations.zh: 一位體型碩大、笑容從容的女子。

translations.en: "Dezana knows much. Have you returned for more @talk or are you in @need?"
translations.zh: 「德薩娜所知甚多。汝是來繼續@攀談，還是有所@需求？」

translations.en: "Mmm...yes?" She looks down at you, her eyes merely slits.
translations.zh: 「嗯……是？」她低頭俯視汝，眼睛瞇成一條縫。

translations.en: "@Dezana." She smiles like a cat preparing for a meal.
translations.zh: 「@德薩娜。」她微笑，如同一隻準備進食的貓。

translations.en: "I can @heal, @cure, and even @resurrect."
translations.zh: 「在下能@治傷、@解毒，甚至@起死回生。」

translations.en: "Yes? What is thy need--@healing, @curing or @resurrection?"
translations.zh: 「是？汝之需求為何——@治傷、@解毒還是@起死回生？」

translations.en: "What? But you carry no dead body!"
translations.zh: 「什麼？汝並未攜帶死者！」

translations.en: "That is correct. Now, are you here to @chat, or are you in @need?"
translations.zh: 「正是。那麼，汝是來@閒談的，還是有所@需求？」

translations.en: "There are many words which travel about this small hamlet."
translations.zh: 「此小村莊中流傳著許多話語。」

translations.en: "Many are intriguing, some are even dangerous. What words have you heard?"
translations.zh: 「有些引人入勝，有些甚至暗藏危機。汝聽說了什麼？」

translations.en: "That is one worth speaking about. You see, many people travel the @spirit world."
translations.zh: 「此事值得一談。汝知道，許多人遊歷@靈魂世界。」

translations.en: "Some are lost souls, others have a purpose. @Quenton is not a lost @soul."
translations.zh: 「有些是迷失的靈魂，有些則有其目的。@昆頓並非迷失的@靈魂。」

translations.en: "It is a mystical place between here and the hereafter. Quenton resides there."
translations.zh: 「那是介於此世與來世之間的神秘之所，昆頓居於其中。」

translations.en: "They spent their whole life without learning anything or growing inside."
translations.zh: 「他們一生未曾學到什麼，內心也從未成長。」

translations.en: "They are as children left alone in a crib. Never learning, always seeking."
translations.zh: 「他們如同被遺棄在搖籃中的孩子，從不學習，只是不斷尋求。」

translations.en: "He had attained much wisdom before he was forced from here."
translations.zh: 「他被迫離開此地之前，已積累了豐厚的智慧。」

translations.en: "If his ghost has been seen..."
translations.zh: 「若他的幽靈已被目擊……」

translations.en: "And I believe he has..."
translations.zh: 「而在下相信確實如此……」

translations.en: "Then he must be attempting to communicate with us about some unfinished business."
translations.zh: 「那他必是試圖就某些未竟之事與我等溝通。」

translations.en: "Perhaps he knows who @killed him."
translations.zh: 「或許他知道是誰@殺了他。」

translations.en: "I know this much: if you wish to find out who murdered him, you won't be able to ask his ghost."
translations.zh: 「在下可以告訴汝：若汝想查明誰謀殺了他，無法直接詢問其幽靈。」

translations.en: "You see, the spirit world can not communicate with ours directly."
translations.zh: 「汝可知，靈魂世界無法與我等的世界直接溝通。」

translations.en: "Although his ghost can hear your questions, he'll respond by @manipulating the environment."
translations.zh: 「雖然他的幽靈能聽見汝的問題，但他會藉由@操控環境來作答。」

translations.en: "Yes, you know, make him demonstrate his answers by, say, shaking a branch."
translations.zh: 「對，就是讓他以晃動樹枝之類的方式來表達答案。」

translations.en: "Those creatures are dangerous. I have heard that they can tear a man to pieces."
translations.zh: 「那些生靈十分危險。在下聽聞，他們能將人撕成碎片。」

translations.en: "So why, then, did the gargoyles not attack @Stivius as well?"
translations.zh: 「那麼，魔像族為何未同時襲擊@斯提維斯？」

translations.en: "Certainly he would have tasted just as good."
translations.zh: 「他肯定同樣「味道鮮美」。」

translations.en: "He is a very stiff man. I believe he may be hiding something about his past."
translations.zh: 「那是個非常拘謹的人，在下相信他在隱瞞過去的某些事。」

translations.en: "A nice fellow, but a bit too simple for me."
translations.zh: 「好人一個，但對在下而言稍嫌簡單。」

translations.en: "I know something about everyone in this village. However, this man is unknown to me."
translations.zh: 「在下了解此村每個人的事，但此人對在下而言卻是謎。」

translations.en: "He never talks about his past."
translations.zh: 「他從不談及過去。」

translations.en: "He is a dear old man. Never has a mean thing to say of anyone."
translations.zh: 「他是個可親的老人，從不說他人的壞話。」

translations.en: "A quaint little man. He has strong feelings for me."
translations.zh: 「一個有趣的小個子，對在下深情款款。」

translations.en: "I must admit, he has a cute way about him."
translations.zh: 「在下必須承認，他自有一種可愛之處。」

translations.en: "She has seen much pain in her life. More than even I can heal. I pity her."
translations.zh: 「她這一生經歷了太多痛苦，甚至超出在下所能療愈之範疇，在下憐憫她。」

translations.en: "He was once a great man. Discovered many of the herbs I use in healing."
translations.zh: 「他曾是一位了不起的人，發現了許多在下用於治療的草藥。」

translations.en: "He discovered something else, however: that total knowledge can corrupt totally."
translations.zh: 「然而他也發現了另一件事：極致的知識能徹底腐化人心。」

translations.en: "I don't know what drove him mad. And I don't want to know." She shudders slightly.
translations.zh: 「在下不知是何物令他癲狂，也不想知道。」她微微顫抖。

translations.en: "Return when you need healing."
translations.zh: 「有需要治療時再來。」

translations.en: "It is not my place to talk about that."
translations.zh: 「此事非在下所宜言。」

translations.en: "You look fine to me."
translations.zh: 「汝看起來安然無恙。」

translations.en: "None of you look hurt!"
translations.zh: 「汝等無人看起來受傷！」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「你們哪位？」

translations.en: "I see thy injury, $Y."
translations.zh: 「在下看到汝的傷了，$Y。」

translations.en: "It will cost you 30 gold, interested?"
translations.zh: 「診金30枚金幣，有意否？」

translations.en: $N approaches $Y and binds the wounds.
translations.zh: $N靠近$Y，為其包紮傷口。

translations.en: "You must pay before I can heal you."
translations.zh: 「汝須先付診金，在下方能為汝治傷。」

translations.en: "Is there something else I can do for you?"
translations.zh: 「還有其他需要效勞之處？」

translations.en: "You don't look poisoned."
translations.zh: 「汝看起來並未中毒。」

translations.en: "Perhaps you have a hangover, 'cause none of you are poisoned."
translations.zh: 「或許汝是宿醉，因為汝等沒有一個中毒。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「你們哪位？」

translations.en: "You look poisoned to me." She nods at $Y.
translations.zh: 「汝看起來確已中毒。」她向$Y點頭。

translations.en: "It'll cost you 10 gold, interested?"
translations.zh: 「解毒費10枚金幣，有意否？」

translations.en: $N grabs a vial and pours it down $Y's throat.
translations.zh: $N取出一瓶藥水，灌入$Y口中。

translations.en: $Y feels much better.
translations.zh: $Y頓感好多了。

translations.en: "You must pay before I can heal you."
translations.zh: 「汝須先付診金，在下方能為汝治傷。」

translations.en: "I see that $Y carries a departed friend."
translations.zh: 「在下見到$Y攜帶著一位亡友。」

translations.en: "Resurrection costs 400 gold, interested?"
translations.zh: 「起死回生費400枚金幣，有意否？」

translations.en: "As you wish."
translations.zh: 「悉聽尊便。」

translations.en: "You don't have enough gold."
translations.zh: 「汝金幣不足。」

translations.en: "You might think about a proper burial."
translations.zh: 「汝或許應考慮妥善安葬。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection for their fallen comrade.
translations.zh: 汝的隊伍為倒下的同伴湊齊了費用。

translations.en: $N lays hands upon the corpse...
translations.zh: $N將手覆於屍體之上……

translations.en: "Doman..."
translations.zh: 「多瑪恩……」

translations.en: "thixus..."
translations.zh: 「提克蘇斯……」

translations.en: "anretu!"
translations.zh: 「安瑞圖！」

translations.en: And the dead live again!
translations.zh: 死者就此重生！

translations.en: "I see that $Y carries another slain friend."
translations.zh: 「在下見到$Y又攜帶了一位亡友。」

translator_notes: 087 Dezana: 體型龐大的醫者，神秘見識廣博。靈魂世界理論重要。咒語音譯與081_Tobatha一致。
